releases.author: olegbrovchenko
releases.description:
Address Obsidian community plugin review warnings:

- Swap deprecated `builtin-modules` package for native `module.builtinModules`
- Replace `!important` declarations with raised-specificity selector
- No user-facing behavior changes

releases.author: olegbrovchenko
releases.description:
## Bases Local Colors v1.1.0

First public release.

**Features**
- Per-base color palettes via sibling `.colors.json` files
- Visual settings UI — color picker, hex input, search bar
- Live 100ms updates — no Obsidian restart needed
- Auto base detection — detects your active base on open
- Schema-aware import — only imports columns defined in the base
- One-click migration from colored-bases-properties

**Install:** Settings → Community Plugins → search "Bases Local Colors"
releases.name: Bases Local Colors v1.1.0
